name: earthcal
description: Sync your moments with Earth's cycles

scripts.package: npm run prepare-public && electron-packager . earthcal --platform=linux --arch=x64 --out=./ --overwrite --prune=true --ignore=/snap --ignore=snapcraft.yaml --ignore=prepare-public.sh --ignore=webpack.config.js && bash -c 'find earthcal-linux-x64/locales -name "*.pak" ! -name "en-US.pak" -delete && echo "[EarthCal] Locales pruned (~30MB saved)."'

author: Russell Maier
